name: IAR Systems Group AB (publ)
summary: IAR Systems Group AB (publ) provides software tools and services for the programming of processors in embedded systems worldwide. The company offers IAR Embedded Workbench, which is a software and a set of development tools that are used to program processors in embedded systems. It also provides C-RUN, an add-on product that analyzes the code when it is executed in a developer's application, and allows the developer to identify errors and bugs at an early stage of the development process; and C-STAT, an add-on product that executes static code analysis. In addition, the company offers IAR Visual State, a product that is used to develop state and event driven embedded systems; and Embedded Trust, a software for implementing security in embedded systems. Further, it provides solutions for securing the Internet of Things (IoT) in embedded systems; and technical support, training, and consulting services. The company serves corporations, as well as of small and medium-sized companies in the automotive, industrial automation, medical technology, consumer electronics, and IoT industries. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Uppsala, Sweden.
